'''washaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niacinate|niacinate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niacinate|niacinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| washaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæshæyæth|wæshæyæth]] || [[word:wæshæyæj|wæshæyæj]] || [[word:wæshæyæsh|wæshæyæsh]] || [[word:wæshæyæ|wæshæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:washashayath|washashayath]] || [[word:washashayaj|washashayaj]] || [[word:washashayash|washashayash]] || [[word:washashaya|washashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:washayath|washayath]] || [[word:washayaj|washayaj]] || [[word:washayash|washayash]] || [[word:washaya|washaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:washafyath|washafyath]] || [[word:washafyaj|washafyaj]] || [[word:washafyash|washafyash]] || [[word:washafyaf|washafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:washayatha|washayatha]] || [[word:washayaja|washayaja]] || [[word:washayasha|washayasha]] || [[word:washayaka|washayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:washayath|washayath]] || [[word:washayaj|washayaj]] || [[word:washayash|washayash]] || [[word:washaya|washaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:washayathal|washayathal]] || [[word:washayajal|washayajal]] || [[word:washayashal|washayashal]] || [[word:washayakal|washayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:washayathatha|washayathatha]] || [[word:washayajaja|washayajaja]] || [[word:washayashasha|washayashasha]] || [[word:washayaka|washayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:washayathan|washayathan]] || [[word:washayajan|washayajan]] || [[word:washayashan|washayashan]] || [[word:washayakan|washayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:washayathaoro|washayathaoro]] || [[word:washayajaoro|washayajaoro]] || [[word:washayashaoro|washayashaoro]] || [[word:washayakaoro|washayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
